title: Loan's Cinema
description: Adds some snacks for the cinema, like popcorn and soda
body:
This small mod adds some cinema-style snacks to Minecraft

What's Included:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Salted Popcorn
- Sweet Popcorn
- Cola Drink
- Energy Drink
- And two types of Chocolate Bars


</details>


These items don’t have crafting recipes yet – they’re meant for creative mode use or roleplay

Made with MCreator
